description: Search for symbols in the codebase using the CodeGraph index. Prefer this over grep when looking up functions, classes, methods, components, or other named symbols — returns kind, file path, line numbers, and signature. Requires a CodeGraph index (run codegraph init in the project if missing).

path.description: Project root directory. Defaults to the current working directory when omitted.

kind.description: Filter by node kind (function, class, method, component, etc.)
